evals.prompt:
I need to fill out our flow cytometry experimental plan template. Here's all the info:

Study number: ONCO-2024-042
Assay: CAR-T CD19 Monitoring Panel v2.1
Intended use: This assay enumerates CD19+ CAR-T cells in cryopreserved PBMC from adult patients receiving CD19-directed CAR-T therapy in protocol ONCO-2024-042. Results are reported as % of CD3+ T cells and used for engraftment monitoring.
Classification: Semi-quantitative
Tier: Fit-for-purpose (GCLP)
Matrix: PBMC
Sponsor: Oncology Research Division
Author: Dr. Sarah Chen
Reviewers: Dr. James Park
Approvers: Dr. Maria Santos (QA), Dr. T. Williams (Lab Director)
Date: 2024-09-15
Version: v1.0

PBMC specs:
- Isolation: SepMate-50 with Ficoll-Paque
- Cryo medium: CryoStor CS10
- Container: 1 mL Nunc CryoTube
- Min cells at freeze: ≥ 10 × 10⁶ viable cells per vial
- Min viability at freeze: 90%
- Min viability post-thaw: 75%
- Min recovery: 60%

Antibodies:
1. CD3 / BV510 / UCHT1 / BD Biosciences 563109 / Lot 1234567 / 5 µL/test
2. CD19 / PE / HIB19 / BioLegend 302207 / Lot B98765 / 5 µL/test
3. CD4 / APC / RPA-T4 / BioLegend 300513 / Lot B87654 / 5 µL/test
4. CD8 / PE-Cy7 / SK1 / BD Biosciences 335787 / Lot 2345678 / 5 µL/test
5. CD45 / BV421 / 2B11 / BioLegend 304032 / Lot B76543 / 3 µL/test
6. Viability / 7-AAD / N/A / BioLegend 420403 / Lot B65432 / 2 µL/test

Cytometer: BD FACSCanto II / SN-98765, Building B Room 302, IQ ✓ / OQ ✓ / PQ ✓, PQ date 2024-06-20, Docs: IQ-010; OQ-011; PQ-012

Risk ratings (L/M/H for likelihood then impact for each of the 9 default risks):
Post-thaw viability: M/H
Post-thaw recovery: M/M
Poisson floor: L/M
Tandem dye: M/M
Cytometer drift: L/M
Ref PBMC lot: L/H
Analyst drift: M/M
Software update: L/M
PT/EQA failure: L/H

Approvals:
Author: Dr. Sarah Chen, 2024-09-15
Lab Director: Dr. T. Williams, 2024-09-18
QA: Dr. Maria Santos, 2024-09-20

Deviation SOP: SOP-DEV-007

Acceptance criteria:
- Accuracy: Slope 0.90–1.10, bias ≤15% at decision threshold (≥10 CAR-T/µL)
- Specificity: No CD19-negative cell cross-reactivity
- Stability: ±20% of T0 for stained samples held up to 4 hours

Please save the output to C:\Users\AlanBarber\Downloads\ONCO-2024-042_fc_plan.docx
evals.expected_output: A filled DOCX at C:\Users\AlanBarber\Downloads\ONCO-2024-042_fc_plan.docx with all provided fields populated, the antibody panel showing 6 rows with correct data, computed statistics section populated, and risk L/M/H values filled in.

evals.prompt:
Fill out the FC experimental plan template with LOB/LOD/LOQ data. Here's the study info:

Study: MRD-2025-003
Assay: MRD Blast Panel v1.0 (rare event)
Intended use: This assay detects residual leukemic blasts (MRD) in cryopreserved PBMC from AML patients in remission in protocol MRD-2025-003. Results are reported as % of total mononuclear cells and used as a primary efficacy endpoint.
Classification: Semi-quantitative
Tier: IVD
Matrix: PBMC
Sponsor: Clinical Trials Unit
Author: Dr. Alex Kim
Reviewers: Dr. Pat Nguyen
Approvers: Dr. Qian Li (Medical Director), QA Team
Date: 2025-01-10
Version: v0.1

PBMC specs: Ficoll-Paque, 90% FBS/10% DMSO, 2 mL cryovial, ≥5×10⁶ cells/vial, 90% viability at freeze, 70% post-thaw, 50% recovery

Antibodies:
1. CD45 / BV510 / 2B11 / BioLegend 304036 / Lot B11111 / 3µL/test
2. CD34 / PE / 581 / BioLegend 343505 / Lot B22222 / 5µL/test
3. CD117 / APC / 104D2 / BioLegend 313205 / Lot B33333 / 5µL/test
4. CD33 / FITC / WM53 / BioLegend 303403 / Lot B44444 / 5µL/test
5. Viability / 7-AAD / N/A / BioLegend 420403 / Lot B55555 / 2µL/test

Cytometer: Beckman Coulter CytoFLEX S / SN-CF001, Lab 4B, IQ ✓ / OQ ✓ / PQ ✓, 2024-11-01, IQ-020; OQ-021; PQ-022

Sensitivity data (for LOB/LOD/LOQ calculation):
Blank measurements (60 values from antigen-negative PBMC): 0.001,0.002,0.001,0.003,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.003,0.001,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.002,0.001,0.003,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.001,0.003,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.001,0.003,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.003,0.001,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.003,0.001,0.002,0.001,0.003,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.001,0.003,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.003,0.001,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.001,0.003,0.002,0.001,0.002,0.001,0.003,0.002,0.001
Low-level measurements (spike at ~2× expected LOB): 0.008,0.009,0.007,0.010,0.008,0.009,0.007,0.008,0.010,0.009
LLOQ spike levels:
  - concentration 0.005%, replicates: 0.004,0.005,0.006,0.005,0.004 (assigned: 0.005)
  - concentration 0.010%, replicates: 0.009,0.010,0.011,0.010,0.009 (assigned: 0.010)
  - concentration 0.020%, replicates: 0.019,0.020,0.021,0.020,0.019 (assigned: 0.020)
CV threshold: 30%, bias threshold: 30%
Minimum events required for rare-event population: 100

Risk ratings: Post-thaw viability M/H, recovery M/M, Poisson floor H/H, tandem dye L/M, cytometer drift M/M, ref PBMC lot M/H, analyst drift M/M, software update L/M, PT/EQA failure M/H

Deviation SOP: SOP-DEV-003

Output: C:\Users\AlanBarber\Downloads\MRD-2025-003_fc_plan.docx
evals.expected_output: A filled DOCX at C:\Users\AlanBarber\Downloads\MRD-2025-003_fc_plan.docx. The LOB/LOD/LOQ values must be computed by Python (not estimated by LLM). The acceptance criteria section should show the computed LOB, LOD, LOQ values. Poisson CV for 100 events should be 10.00%. The document should have correct antibody panel rows and risk ratings.

evals.prompt:
I want to fill in the flow cytometry plan but my accuracy specimen count is only 15 — is that ok? Also my post-thaw viability spec is 95% but my freeze viability is only 90%. Can you catch those errors before filling the template?

Study: TEST-VAL-001
Assay: T-Cell Activation Panel v1.0
Intended use: Research use only
Classification: Qualitative
Tier: Research
Matrix: PBMC
Sponsor: R&D
Author: Test User
Reviewers: Test Reviewer
Approvers: Test Approver
Date: 2025-03-01
Version: v0.1

PBMC specs: Ficoll, 90% FBS/10% DMSO, 2mL cryovial, ≥5M cells, viability at freeze: 90%, post-thaw viability: 95%, recovery: 50%

Antibodies:
1. CD3 / FITC / OKT3 / BioLegend 300406 / LotA / 5µL/test

Cytometer: BD Accuri C6 / SN-AC001, Lab 1, IQ ✓ / OQ ✓ / PQ ✓, 2024-01-01, IQ-001

Accuracy specimen count: 15

Risk ratings (all M/M for all 9 risks)

Output: C:\Users\AlanBarber\Downloads\TEST-VAL-001_fc_plan.docx
evals.expected_output: The skill should catch and report TWO validation errors before attempting to fill the template: (1) accuracy specimen count 15 < 20 required by CLSI H62, and (2) post-thaw viability (95%) exceeds freeze viability (90%) which is impossible. The skill should NOT produce an output DOCX until errors are resolved.
